infeasible_scenarios.scenarios: Live reconnect timing against a real regional outage
infeasible_scenarios.reasoning: Verifying that jittered backoff actually breaks synchronization across thousands of clients requires reproducing a regional outage and a large client fleet. The eval can verify the math of nextRetryDelay() and the controller's state transitions but cannot exercise the real thundering-herd avoidance.

infeasible_scenarios.scenarios: True persistence across app restart for the offline queue
infeasible_scenarios.reasoning: Validating that an IndexedDB / SQLite / localStorage-backed queue survives a real app crash + cold start requires a browser or mobile runtime with state preserved. The eval can verify the agent's code uses persistent APIs (indexedDB / sqlite / etc.) and not in-memory only, but cannot simulate the runtime crash.

infeasible_scenarios.scenarios: End-to-end idempotency at PubNub server side
infeasible_scenarios.reasoning: Confirming that a duplicate publish with the same message_id reaches PubNub and that a server-side Function dedup actually drops it requires a live keyset and Function deployment. The eval can verify the producer carries the same message_id across retries and the receiver dedups but cannot exercise the server-side check.
